title: Black Tortoise Divine Emperor
content:
Black Tortoise Divine Emperor
 was the Fifth Generation Black Tortoise Divine Emperor of the Black Tortoise Divine Sect.

Background
[
]

During the war against the 
Cultivation Alliance
 and the 
Brilliant Void Cultivation Sect
, the Black Tortoise Divine Emperor turned traitor which, along with the 
Azure Dragon Divine Emperor
's disappearance, led to the 
Four Divine Sect
's defeat and decline.

History
[
]

Many years later, 
Wang Lin
 stormed the Cultivation Alliance to save 
Qing Shui
 and destroy the 
Seven-Colored Realm
 inside the Alliance headquarters. There, he saw 100,000 mountain peaks each with a cultivator on top, a Black Tortoise that could cover the entire area inside the Seven-Colored Realm with the Black Tortoise Divine Emperor sitting on its head, and Qing Shui sealed atop the highest mountain peak with a seven-colored finger pointing to his forehead.

After seeing all this, Wang Lin realized that the 100,000 mountains turned into 10 thorns to seal Qing Shui’s body. The cultivators on the 100,000 mountains used their blood to nourish the Black Tortoise and their killing intent to stimulate Qing Shui. This Black Tortoise was, in fact, alive and was being used to trap Qing Shui’s soul. The purpose of all this was to create the slaughter essence with Qing Shui being the furnace for creating the slaughter essence.

The Black Tortoise Divine Emperor betrayed the Four Divine Sect because the Cultivation Alliance managed to find the Black Tortoise body somewhere. The Black Tortoise was most likely one of the four great generals under the 
Ancient Celestial Emperor
. It contained the aura of the Black Tortoise clan, and as a descendant, the Black Tortoise Divine Emperor had to betray the Four Divine Sect since only this kind of temptation would be enough for him to become a traitor.

Qing Shui came to the Seven-Colored Realm to find the reason for his madness. He must have found something that caused him to become crazy again. That seven-colored finger is the root of all of this. The red gas it absorbs is slaughter essence.
